selections.name: Il Patrigno
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Caulfield Cl3-Sw to Maiden company. Elite speed figures for this grade.

selections.name: Regal Gent
selections.reason: Drops from 3yo SWP at Mornington. Prior 3rd at Geelong reads well for this.

selections.name: Silky Seth
selections.reason: Consistent form with back-to-back placings. Gets a soft run from the inside gate.

selections.name: Riverlea Prince
selections.reason: Solid 2nd at this track and distance last start. Wide draw is the main concern.

danger_horse.name: Regal Gent
danger_horse.reason: Class drop makes him a major threat if he can replicate his Geelong run.

selections.name: Holding Captive
selections.reason: Maher-trained gelding who was narrowly beaten on debut. Inside draw is a big plus.

selections.name: Kandinsky
selections.reason: Price/Kent runner resuming. Showed ability on debut and has trialled well.

selections.name: Determinato
selections.reason: Resuming after a solid 3rd at Horsham. Recent trial win suggests he is ready.

selections.name: Choice Encounter
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut but faded. Can improve second-up with race experience.

danger_horse.name: Kandinsky
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable and natural improvement second-up makes him very dangerous.

selections.name: Mahmudah
selections.reason: Huge class drop from Caulfield Cl3-Sw. Narrowly beaten at Ballarat prior. Standout.

selections.name: Raining Fire
selections.reason: Promising 3rd at Werribee when resuming. Fitter now and looks the main danger.

selections.name: Colt Forty Five
selections.reason: Resuming. Has run well fresh in the past and draws nicely.

selections.name: It's Justa Guess
selections.reason: Consistent recent form including a 3rd at Tocumwal. Place claims despite wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Raining Fire
danger_horse.reason: Progressive type who will strip fitter second-up.

selections.name: Finance Work
selections.reason: Solid 2nd at this track and distance last start. Has upside and looks ready to win.

selections.name: I'm Savvy As
selections.reason: Placed in both runs this prep. Draws well and should be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Path Of Heroes
selections.reason: Fair 4th at Sale on debut. Will be better for the experience.

selections.name: Last Piece
selections.reason: Inside draw helps. Has shown glimpses of ability and can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: I'm Savvy As
danger_horse.reason: Peaking third-up and maps perfectly from barrier 3.

selections.name: Kid Dynamite
selections.reason: Strong winner at this track and distance last start. Can repeat the dose.

selections.name: Kyle
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Cranbourne last start. Consistent and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Tessatori
selections.reason: Resuming. Has form in stronger races and trialled okay.

selections.name: Bimballa
selections.reason: Broke maiden status at Swan Hill. Progressive filly who can measure up.

danger_horse.name: Kyle
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent at this level and just missed last start.

selections.name: Top Calibre
selections.reason: Significant class drop from Caulfield Bm78. Will find this much easier.

selections.name: Akicita
selections.reason: Strong winner at Sale last start. Wide draw is tricky but has the class.

selections.name: Miss Mahjong
selections.reason: Placed at Ballarat Bm70 recently. Well suited in this grade.

selections.name: Al Prancer
selections.reason: Resuming. Won fresh last prep and draws to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Akicita
danger_horse.reason: In winning form and capable of overcoming the wide gate.

selections.name: Until Valhalla
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Drops from Caulfield Bm78 and Group 3 company. Should dominate.

selections.name: Fire Tribe
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after strong wins at Echuca and Sandown. Inside draw is ideal.

selections.name: The Shaper
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten at Morphettville Bm72. Consistent and maps well.

selections.name: Lario
selections.reason: Won well at Geelong last start. Harder here but in good form.

danger_horse.name: Fire Tribe
danger_horse.reason: Flying at present and gets the gun run from barrier 1.

selections.name: Lethal Thoughts
selections.reason: Strong 2nd at Donald Bm62. Consistent type who is overdue for a win.

selections.name: Blakmax
selections.reason: Drops in grade from Ballarat Bm70. Capable of sharp improvement here.

selections.name: Manifest The Milli
selections.reason: Forgive last start at Caulfield. Won well prior and can bounce back.

selections.name: Titan Of Choice
selections.reason: Fair 5th at Cranbourne. Capable of running into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Blakmax
danger_horse.reason: Class drop is significant and draws well.
